description_long: This necklace features a series of alternating beads in various shapes and colors, strung together in a continuous loop. The beads include rounded lavender spheres, black spherical beads, elongated translucent cylinders, and coral-colored beads shaped like roses or flowers. The arrangement creates a visually striking pattern, with the floral beads providing a focal point among the more geometric elements. The necklace is displayed on a white bust, highlighting the contrast between the soft pastel and bold black tones. The overall design is playful yet elegant, suitable for casual or semi-formal urban wear.
description: A beaded necklace with alternating lavender, black, translucent, and coral rose-shaped beads, arranged in a visually striking pattern.
description_view_0: Front view shows the necklace's central section with prominent coral rose-shaped beads and alternating round and cylindrical beads.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated translucent beads and the sequence of bead shapes along the necklace's curve.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the full circular arrangement and the repeating pattern of bead types around the entire necklace.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the alternating bead sequence and the interplay of colors and shapes.
